title: samedi - German Practice Management & Scheduling Platform
problem: German healthcare practices, MVZs, and clinics struggle with appointment management, patient communication, and administrative overhead. High phone volume, manual scheduling, and lack of integrated digital tools reduce practice efficiency.
solution: Comprehensive practice management and scheduling platform with online booking, AI-powered phone assistant, digital patient forms, video consultations, and resource management. Integrates with 40+ practice management systems (PVS) and hospital information systems (KIS). Features automated patient communication, reminders, and workflow optimization.
technology: Cloud-based practice management, AI scheduling assistant, video consultations, digital forms, C5-Testat Typ 2 security, ISO 27001 & ISO 9001 certified
target_customer: Medical practices, MVZs (medical care centers), clinics, hospitals
regulatory_notes: C5-Testat Typ 2 (BSI), GDPR compliant, KBV-certified video consultations, German telematics infrastructure compatible
varden_fit: HIGH — Proves practice management software in DACH market. Replicable SaaS model with strong integration play. Less sophisticated than US RCM but covers core scheduling/communication infrastructure.
notes: Strong reference customer for DACH practice management. Focuses on scheduling and patient communication rather than deep billing/claims. White-label online booking sets them apart.
